name: affiliate_click_oid
description: Unique object identifier for this click

name: affiliate_oid
description: Affiliate object ID associated with this click

name: click_dts
description: Date/time that the click was made

name: ip_address
description: IP address that generated the click

name: referrer
description: URL that referred the click (Browser Header Referer)

name: sub_id
description: Sub ID value passed on the click

name: affiliate_link_oid
description: Unique object identifier for for the link that this click is associated with

name: link
description: Link object associated with this click

fields.name: affiliate_link_oid
fields.description: Unique object identifier associated with this link

fields.name: affiliate_oid
fields.description: Affiliate object ID associated with this link

fields.name: creative_oid
fields.description: Creative (image or text) associated with this link

fields.name: custom_html
fields.description: Custom HTML associated with this link

fields.name: custom_html_approval_status
fields.description: Approved status of the custom html

fields.name: deleted
fields.description: True if the link has been deleted

fields.name: custom_landing_url
fields.description: Custom landing page URL if configured

fields.name: affiliate_program_item_oid
fields.description: The affiliate program item this managed link is associated with

fields.name: affiliate_managed_link_oid
fields.description: Managed link OID that this link object was generated from

name: referrer_query_string
description: Query string that was on the referrer URL.

name: landing_page
description: URL of the landing page the customer was sent to.

name: landing_page_query_string
description: Query string on the landing page URL the customer was sent to.
